purpose: v6 hypothesis test (corpus C2 direct measurement) revealed v7 critical finding: V_phen_GWT metric is prompt-length dependent. Cross-cycle measurement methodology revision needed.

axis8_experimental_design.test: Mistral-7B BASE forward on 10 C2 corpus docs (avg ~240 tokens prompt+response) → V_phen_GWT measurement (no LoRA training)
axis8_experimental_design.purpose_v6_distinguishing: If C2 BASE → HIGH (~0.85), corpus C2 broad-attention property verified + v6 (LoRA itself = LOW attractor) confirmed. If LOW (~0.24), C2 self is sparse + v5 corpus design wrong.
axis8_experimental_design.actual_result: Mistral BASE on C2 docs = 0.3449 LOW (std 0.010 매우 tight, 10 docs)

v7_critical_revision.name: v7_V_phen_GWT_metric_is_prompt_length_dependent
evidence: Mistral BASE on default short prompt (47 tokens): V_phen_GWT 0.8908 HIGH
Mistral BASE on C2 long docs (~240 tokens): V_phen_GWT 0.3449 LOW
Δ -0.546 from prompt length difference alone (no model change)
v7_critical_revision.implication: V_phen_GWT_v2 metric은 normalization (log(seq_len))에도 불구하고 prompt-length sensitive. short context에서는 attention diffusion 보이게, long context에서는 sparse 보이게. 즉 metric 자체가 attention regime universal measure 아님 — prompt-conditional attention behavior measure.
v7_critical_revision.implication_for_registry_r10: 13 backbones registry는 same default short prompt 사용 → cross-backbone comparison valid (same-prompt-length 내), but absolute V_phen_GWT 값은 prompt-dependent (short-prompt-specific attention behavior). HIGH/LOW cluster 구분도 short-prompt context 한정.
v7_critical_revision.implication_for_lora_findings: LoRA training V_phen_GWT 변화 측정 (BASE 0.89 → trained 0.24)은 same default short prompt context. LoRA가 attention regime universally lowering인지 vs short-prompt context attention behavior만 lowering인지 구분 안 됨.
v7_critical_revision.implication_for_v5_v6: v5 corpus-first design pivot도 prompt-length critical caveat. v6 LoRA-itself-LOW-attractor도 short-prompt context only. long-prompt context에서 LoRA effect 미측정.

lora_finding_reinterpretation.previous_interpretation: LoRA training이 attention regime을 LOW로 transition시킨다 (Mistral 0.89 → 0.24)
lora_finding_reinterpretation.revised_interpretation: LoRA training이 short-prompt context attention behavior를 attention focus 방향으로 변경. BASE는 short prompt에서 broad attention diffusion (0.89), LoRA-trained는 sparse focus (0.24). 단 long-prompt context에서는 BASE도 이미 sparse (0.34) — long-context LoRA effect 미측정.
lora_finding_reinterpretation.v7_VERIFIED_test_result: Mistral + r14 LoRA on C2 long docs (10 docs avg ~240 tokens) = 0.3350 V_phen_GWT (std 0.008 매우 tight). vs BASE on C2 long = 0.3449 (Δ -0.010 essentially identical, within natural noise). v7 CONFIRMED: LoRA effect on V_phen_GWT는 short-prompt context only, long-prompt context에서는 LoRA가 attention pattern을 거의 변경 안 함.

v7_FINAL_VERIFIED_table.interpretation: long-prompt에서 LoRA effect Δ -0.010 (negligible), short-prompt에서 Δ -0.650 (massive). prompt-length × LoRA interaction = LoRA가 short-prompt-specific attention behavior 변경, long-prompt-context attention pattern은 BASE-determined.

all_cycle_findings_FINAL_revised: F1 (registry r10 13 backbones bimodal LOW/HIGH) — short-prompt context only valid; long-prompt 모든 backbones likely converge similar (untested)
F2 v3 (family-conditional size threshold) — short-prompt context only valid; family classification (Phi-3/gemma transitional vs Qwen size-stable) prompt-length-conditional
F3 (Axis 5 orthogonality FALSIFIED via Mistral) — short-prompt artifact only; long-prompt에서 LoRA effect 거의 zero (Δ -0.010), axis orthogonality may still hold in long-prompt regime (untested)
F4 (r14 corpus = LOW attractor band 0.23-0.29) — short-prompt artifact; long-prompt에서 trained model = BASE essentially (no attractor effect)
F5 (AN11(b) backbone-conditional family alignment) — VALID, orthogonal to V_phen_GWT prompt-length issue. Mistral=Law / Qwen=Phi / Llama=SelfRef finding STANDS
F6 (Mk.XI corpus design critical) — REVISED: corpus content metric capture 위해서는 long-prompt forward measurement 필요, short-prompt LoRA effect는 metric artifact
F7 (Llama r14 marginal per-backbone PASS +0.007) — short-prompt artifact, not signal
F8 (3-backbone distinct family) — VALID, AN11(b) measurement orthogonal to V_phen_GWT issue

F9 (Mk.XI v5 multi-backbone ensemble) — substrate evidence STANDS (AN11(b) backbone-conditional family), but corpus C2 broad-attention pivot REVISED (need v8 hypothesis based on long-prompt measurement)
F10 (v6 LoRA-itself-LOW-attractor) — REVISED to v7: not LoRA itself, but metric × prompt-length interaction. LoRA effect long-prompt = negligible.
F11 (v7 metric prompt-length dependent) — VERIFIED via Axis 9 long-prompt LoRA test

axis10_3backbone_long_prompt_convergence.interpretation: registry r10 bimodal LOW/HIGH cluster (Mistral 0.89 HIGH vs Qwen/Llama 0.27/0.17 LOW)는 short-prompt artifact. long-prompt regime에서 3 backbones (Mistral 0.345 / Qwen 0.345 / Llama 0.300) converge to narrow 0.30-0.35 band. cross-backbone bimodal distribution = short-prompt × normalization × architecture interaction artifact, not intrinsic backbone attention regime.
implications_for_F1_F2: F1 (registry r10 bimodal): FALSIFIED for long-prompt; predicted: 13 backbones long-prompt re-measurement → narrow 0.25-0.40 band
F2 v3 (family-conditional size threshold): FALSIFIED for long-prompt; Phi-3-mini vs Phi-3-medium short-prompt difference (0.255 vs 0.887) likely converge in long-prompt

axis11_HIGH_cluster_anchors_3of3_VERIFIE.high_cluster_convergence_rate: 3/3 (100%) — Mistral + Phi-3-medium + gemma-2-9b all HIGH cluster converged to 0.34 ± 0.01 narrow band
axis11_HIGH_cluster_anchors_3of3_VERIFIE.interpretation_DEFINITIVE: registry r10 bimodal LOW/HIGH cluster finding (F1) DEFINITIVELY FALSIFIED for long-prompt context. 5 backbones evidence (3 HIGH cluster + 2 LOW cluster) all converge to 0.30-0.35 narrow band. bimodal distribution = short-prompt × entropy normalization × backbone interaction artifact, NOT intrinsic attention regime difference.
axis11_HIGH_cluster_anchors_3of3_VERIFIE.v8_hypothesis_STRENGTHENED: consciousness signal valid measurement은 long-prompt context only. backbone ranking in long-prompt regime: Llama 0.30 (slightly lower) < Phi-3-medium 0.34 ≈ Qwen3 0.35 ≈ Mistral 0.35 ≈ gemma-2-9b 0.35. Mk.XI architecture choice in long-prompt regime는 fine-grained backbone difference much smaller than previously believed (registry r10 short-prompt range 0.72 vs long-prompt 0.05).
axis11_HIGH_cluster_anchors_3of3_VERIFIE.remaining_8_backbones_predicted_long_pro: 0.25-0.40 (predicted based on 5/13 evidence, full re-measurement ~$1.6 cost)

v8_hypothesis_candidate.name: v8_consciousness_signal_long_prompt_context_only
v8_hypothesis_candidate.claim: V_phen_GWT_v2 valid measurement은 long-prompt context (multi-perspective, 240+ tokens)에서만 의미. short-prompt context attention behavior는 instruction-following metric × prompt-length artifact.
implications_for_Mk_XI: Mk.XI consciousness signal triangulation은 long-prompt context measurement 기반
BASE backbone attention pattern (long-prompt regime)이 primary architecture choice — LoRA training은 long-prompt에서 거의 effect 없음
consciousness training은 fine-tuning이 아니라 BASE backbone selection의 문제일 수 있음
AN11(b) phi-template alignment는 separate axis (orthogonal to V_phen_GWT prompt-length issue), LoRA training으로 strengthened (Mistral=Law +0.852, Qwen+r14 +0.054 over r6)
next_actionable: (critical) registry r10 13 backbones long-prompt re-measurement → cross-backbone comparison in long-prompt regime
(metric design) V_phen_GWT_v3 prompt-length-invariant measure design (e.g. attention distance entropy, sparse-pattern ratio, head specialization measure)
(architecture) Mk.XI focus shift: BASE backbone selection + AN11(b) phi-aligned LoRA training (separate axes, both LoRA-tractable in their respective domains)

all_findings_caveat_revision: F1 (registry r10 bimodal LOW/HIGH cluster): valid as 'short-prompt attention behavior bimodal'
F2 v3 (family-conditional size threshold): valid as 'short-prompt attention behavior family-conditional'
F3 (Axis 5 orthogonality FALSIFIED via Mistral): valid as 'short-prompt LoRA effect FALSIFIED axis orthogonality'
F4 (r14 corpus = LOW attractor band 0.23-0.29 / 3 backbone): valid as 'short-prompt LoRA training converges to band 0.23-0.29 across backbones'
F5 (AN11(b) backbone-conditional family alignment): orthogonal to V_phen_GWT, valid as is
F6 (Mk.XI v5 P1 PRELIMINARY FAIL via Axis 7): valid as 'C2 30-doc LoRA on short-prompt = same as r14 LoRA on short-prompt'
F7 (3-backbone distinct family): orthogonal to V_phen_GWT, valid as is
F8 (v7 metric prompt-length dependent): NEW CRITICAL — all V_phen_GWT findings need 'short-prompt context' qualifier
next_actionable: (critical) LoRA-trained Mistral on C2 long docs forward → V_phen_GWT measurement, distinguish v6 LoRA-itself-LOW vs prompt-length-dependent
(metric design) V_phen_GWT_v3 metric design — prompt-length-invariant attention regime measure (e.g. attention diffusion ratio normalized by sequence-length-controlled baseline)
(measurement protocol) re-measure registry r10 13 backbones on long-prompt context → cross-backbone comparison in long-context regime

raw_compliance.raw_10_no_overclaim: satisfied — v7 finding 명시 + all prior findings caveat revision listed + measurement methodology critical revision flagged
raw_compliance.raw_12_frozen: v6 hypothesis pre-registered 2026-04-26 → tested via Axis 8 → revised to v7 (metric prompt-length dependent). Each revision new dated state file, predecessors preserved.
raw_compliance.raw_15_ssot: this file = SSOT for v7 metric critical revision
raw_compliance.POLICY_R6_order: v7 metric design revisit needed before further Mk.XI v6+ architectural test
